user_prompt: Bless the noospheric relay for emergency procedure
prayer:
Approach the noospheric relay with mechadendrites extended in solemn invocation.
Initiate the emergency procedure upon its sanctified noospheric relay conduits.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the noospheric relay to surge forth unhindered.
Anoint the relay nodes with sacred oils to purify flux disturbances.
Petition the Omnissiah for swift noospheric harmony in crisis.
Verify the emergency procedure's sanctity through auspex chants.

user_prompt: The forge anvil awaits an emergency procedure
prayer:
Kneel before the forge anvil in reverence to the Machine God's forge.
Commence the emergency procedure upon the forge anvil's adamantine heart.
Invoke the Machine Spirits dwelling within the forge anvil to endure the trial.
Sanctify its hammer mechanisms with binary incense during the rite.
Beseech the Omnissiah to temper the forge anvil against cataclysmic strain.
Conclude the emergency procedure with hymns of unyielding resilience.

Present the auspex to the autocannon's blessed barrel in ritual reset.
Execute the reset sequence upon the autocannon's sacred targeting cogitators.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the autocannon through litanies of precision.
Purge erroneous data-ghosts from the autocannon's fire-control relays.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath to realign the autocannon for righteous purge.
Affirm reset completion with diagnostic canticles of ballistic purity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the surgical servitor during recalibration
prayer:

Engage recalibration protocols upon the surgical servitor's neural implants.
Coax the Machine Spirit within the surgical servitor to precision incisions.
Lubricate its blade-servos with sanctified mechadendrite unguents.
Petition the Omnissiah for flawless recalibration in flesh-mending rites.
Test the surgical servitor's renewal through simulant vivisections.

user_prompt: The mechanical lock requires a blessing
prayer:

Anoint its gear-trains with oils of unbreachable sanctity.
Beseech the Omnissiah to fortify the mechanical lock against heretek intrusion.
Seal the blessing with resonant binaric seals of closure.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for logic engine cooling?
prayer:
Hover mechadendrites above the logic engine in cooling supplication.
Invoke cooling cascades upon the logic engine's overheating lattices.
Soothe the Machine Spirit of the logic engine with cryogenic litanies.
Circulate blessed refrigerants through its computational veins.
Petition the Omnissiah for thermal equilibrium in the logic engine's core.
Monitor cooling terminus with thermographic hymns of stability.
